{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114434208539D7DB2621A91A88A"}"},"total":81},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614374373906219838","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我总来说主角受的性格挺好的，而且也能表现出这是一个双强的文吧。有智慧，然后嗯，前期的时候就是有点趋向于内宅，然后后面的话就是遇到一个拐卖儿童的事件，然后他立住神童的人设去完成这件事。嗯总的来说挺好看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772862060,"group_id":"7601706579003460632","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"莲纹凝韧风缠竹，山水同程意自笃。
探险敢踏千峰雾，听谣闲嚼世间俗。笑撩竹影轻相触，醉揽莲香软共宿。悲喜皆随君步履，余生岁岁伴江湖。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwJ+526VV5BpzGNacK0ObrawOKxVYW0Gs1EdeNyiklnl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8e18c0233dff41fdabdf5bea976a3656~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623179&x-signature=Vl%2Bf80FQ%2FhYh9aP%2B8XChVbf1K2c%3D","user_id":"1810233561188944","user_name":"春糜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1810233561188944","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":16,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601706579003460632","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主年上差10岁，穿书，幼崽，剧情流，宅斗，科举打脸，双洁，身心唯一】
评分低是因为刚开分，后面会涨的。
猝死前，沈凌玩杂货铺小游戏没通关，看广告复活时，大数据给他推送了一本缠绵悱恻爱恨纠缠的女频古代言情小说。
官场失意的他，孀居在家的她，十年前上位者乱点鸳鸯谱，让青梅竹马两小无猜的男女主吃尽苦头，好在主角们坚守本心，久经风霜，阴差阳错于中年低谷期相逢，抛却烦恼忧伤世俗杂念，勇敢地双向奔赴互相救赎，终于携手一生。
猝死后，沈凌一睁眼，发现自己带着杂货铺面板穿书了。
他不是男主，不是女主，不是反派，也不是炮灰。
而是游走在故事边缘，女主那个在嫡庶之争中早死的纨绔前夫。
七岁的沈凌抹了一把辛酸泪，颇为仁义地想:放心吧，家人们，他俩包在一起的。
锦衣卫指挥使攻×穿越庶子全才受
架空旻朝，人文国情、社会风貌都参考大明，不一样的地方以书中世界为准
因为我不太喜欢写副cp，所以原书男女主只打酱油","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0440c214f1a10b9772ad3a99a9fcd725~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小桌子","author_id":"","book_id":"7601706579003460632","book_name":"穿书之庶子自救指南","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601706619834991128","read_count":"25374","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"189121"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"66","tags":"双男主,古言权谋,位尊权重,团宠,打脸,穿书","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0440c214f1a10b9772ad3a99a9fcd725~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259422&x-signature=tmWhYEKHKW3QoSy1QVZymbBxYDU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"646984474568046","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"112"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114434208539D7DB2621A91A88A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1
